cards.name: Soldier Maker
cards.text: Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

cards.name: Beast Summoner
cards.text: When Beast Summoner enters the battlefield, create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.

cards.name: Treasure Hunter
cards.text: When Treasure Hunter deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token.

cards.name: Drake Nest
cards.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a 2/2 blue Drake creature token with flying.

cards.name: Multi Token Generator
cards.text: Create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens and a 4/4 green Rhino creature token with trample.
